about.label: About us
about.title: One person. The whole agency.
about.intro: My name is Ivan Kunne and I am Frameflow. The person who writes your quote is the same person who builds your website, takes the photos, manages social media — and picks up the phone at 8 PM if something goes wrong. That's not common. And that's the whole point.
about.origin: Originally from the Netherlands, Bergen became my home in 2023. Since then I've helped businesses in Bergen and internationally build a digital presence that actually converts — not just looks good.
about.guaranteeDesc: All projects are completed by me personally — no stand-ins, no junior deliverables, no surprises. All files and access are always yours.
about.point1: You always speak directly with me, not an account manager
about.point2: One point of contact from idea to launch
about.point3: Local knowledge of the Bergen market

process.label: The process
process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from first conversation to final delivery — whether you need a website, content or the full package.
process.step1Desc: We start with a free 30-minute call. We get to know your business, goals and customers — no obligations, just value.
process.step2Desc: We set up a concrete plan with goals, design requirements and technical specifications. You approve everything before we start building.
process.step3Desc: We produce and build the solution — whether it's websites, content, images or campaigns. Close dialogue throughout, and you approve along the way.
process.step4Desc: We launch, test thoroughly on all devices and make sure everything works. And we're available for support after you go live.

projects.label: Our work
projects.title: Selected projects
projects.horbitDesc: Workflow app that brings together tasks, chat and documents. 150+ team members and 5,000+ daily interactions.
projects.sportsbytteDesc: Complete web design and new visual identity for Norway's platform for buying, selling and swapping used sports equipment.
projects.marbesaDesc: Luxury property website launched in 3 weeks. Generated 12 qualified leads in the first month.
projects.gvDesc: Website and social media that increased the booking rate by 67% in the first quarter after launch.

testimonials.label: What clients say
testimonials.title: Results you can trust
testimonials.subtitle: We don't measure success in number of files delivered — we measure it in results our clients actually achieve.
testimonials.t1: Frameflow gave Sportsbytte a professional website and a visual identity we're proud to show off. The result is a modern platform that attracts users and creates engagement — far better than what we had before.
testimonials.t2: Frameflow delivered an app that our team actually uses every day. From idea to finished product, the process was structured and smooth — Ivan was closely involved throughout, and you can tell in the end result.
testimonials.t3: After Frameflow took over the website and social media we noticed a clear increase in booking enquiries. The content is consistent and professional, and Ivan is always available when we need something.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find the answer? Get in touch directly — we respond quickly.
faq.msg1Client: Hi! How much does a website cost?
faq.msg1Ivan: Websites start from NOK 12,000. Book a free call and we'll give you a fixed price!
faq.q1: How much does a website cost in Bergen?
faq.a1: A business website starts from NOK 12,000. The price depends on scope, functionality and design. We always give a fixed price — no surprises afterwards. Request a no-obligation quote and you'll have a concrete figure within 24 hours.
faq.a2: Frameflow delivers web design, app development, photo and video production, branding and social media — all under one roof. We tailor the services to your business and deliver measurable results.
faq.q3: What makes Frameflow different from other agencies?
faq.a3: You always speak directly with Ivan — the person who actually does the work. No middlemen, no junior deliverables. We know the Bergen market and work with fixed prices and a satisfaction guarantee.
faq.q4: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a4: A standard business website typically takes 3–6 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on scope and access to content. We set up a clear timeline from day one.
faq.q5: Do you only work with businesses in Bergen?
faq.a5: We're based in Bergen and know the local market well, but we're equally happy working with businesses elsewhere in Norway and internationally — as with Marbesa Project 94 in Marbella.
faq.a6: Book a free 30-minute call via the contact form, email or call +47 99 85 37 81. No obligations — we'll hear about your project and tell you honestly what we can do.
faq.q7: Is Frameflow a web agency in Bergen?
faq.a7: Yes — Frameflow is a web agency in Bergen that helps businesses build websites, graphic design and logo design. We're also a marketing agency with expertise in photo, video and social media, so you can get everything under one roof.

privacy.metaDesc: Read about how Frameflow processes your personal data. Find out what data we collect, how it is used and your GDPR rights.
privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Frameflow v/ Ivan Kunne is the data controller for personal data collected via this website.
privacy.s2Intro: We only collect data you provide yourself when you contact us via the website:
privacy.s2Item5: The content of your message or quote request
privacy.s2Outro: We do not collect personal data automatically during normal visits to the website, and we do not use third-party tracking tools such as Google Analytics without your consent.
privacy.s3Body: The data you provide is used solely to respond to your enquiry and potentially enter into a working relationship.
privacy.s4Body: We store your data only as long as necessary for the purpose for which it was collected. Enquiries where no agreement is entered into are normally deleted within 12 months. Data related to active client relationships is retained in accordance with accounting law requirements (5 years).
privacy.s5Body: The website uses functional cookies that are necessary for forms and navigation to work. We do not use third-party marketing cookies without explicit consent. Your consent is stored in your browser and can be withdrawn at any time by deleting your browser's local storage.
privacy.s6Intro: Under GDPR you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.r1Desc: You can request to see what data we hold about you.
privacy.r2Desc: You can request that inaccurate data be corrected.
privacy.r3Desc: You can request that your data be deleted ('the right to be forgotten').
privacy.r4Desc: You can ask us to restrict the processing of your data.
privacy.r5Desc: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.r6Desc: You can request to receive your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.s6Outro: To exercise your rights, contact us at ivan@frameflow.no. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7Body: If you believe we are processing your personal data in violation of GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Norwegian Data Protection Authority (datatilsynet.no).
privacy.s8Body: We may update this privacy policy as needed. The date at the top of the page shows when it was last updated. We encourage you to read the policy regularly.
privacy.ctaDesc: Contact Ivan directly — we reply quickly.
